presets.code:
static func straight_shot(start: Vector2, direction: Vector2, speed: float = 400.0) -> Dictionary:
	return {"position": start, "velocity": direction.normalized() * speed, "gravity": 0.0}

static func simple_arc(start: Vector2, end: Vector2, arc_height: float = 100.0) -> PackedVector2Array:
	return ProjectileMath.sample_arc_points(start, end, arc_height, 20)

presets.description: Projectile that homes toward a target.

presets.code:
static func robot_laser(start: Vector2, direction: Vector2) -> Dictionary:
	return {"position": start, "velocity": direction.normalized() * 900.0, "gravity": 0.0, "color": Color(1, 0.3, 0.1)}

static func charged_shot(charge_level: float = 1.0, direction: Vector2 = Vector2.RIGHT) -> Dictionary:
	var spd := 200.0 + charge_level * 600.0
	var size := 1.0 + charge_level * 2.0
	return {"velocity": direction.normalized() * spd, "scale": Vector2.ONE * size}

presets.description: Blob of oil launched in an arc.
Draw arc preview on a Line2D.
presets.code:
static func draw_arc_preview(line: Line2D, start: Vector2, end: Vector2, height: float = 100.0) -> void:
	if not line: return
	line.points = ProjectileMath.sample_arc_points(start, end, height, 20)

static func gravity_projectile(start: Vector2, velocity: Vector2, gravity: float = 980.0) -> Dictionary:
	return {"position": start, "velocity": velocity, "gravity": gravity}

static func bounce_projectile(start: Vector2, direction: Vector2, speed: float = 400.0, bounces: int = 3) -> Dictionary:
	return {"position": start, "velocity": direction.normalized() * speed, "bounces_left": bounces}

static func radial_burst_8(center: Vector2) -> Array:
	var results: Array = []
	for i in range(8):
		var a := TAU * i / 8.0
		results.append({"position":center,"velocity":Vector2.RIGHT.rotated(a)*350})
	return results

static func boomerang(start: Vector2, direction: Vector2) -> Dictionary:
	return {"position":start,"velocity":direction.normalized()*350,"returning":false,"return_speed":500,"origin":start}

static func high_arc(start: Vector2, end: Vector2) -> PackedVector2Array:
	return ProjectileMath.sample_arc_points(start, end, 180, 24)

presets.description: Predict aim point for moving target.

presets.code:
static func wind_projectile(start: Vector2, direction: Vector2, wind: Vector2) -> Dictionary:
	return {"position":start,"velocity":direction.normalized()*350,"wind":wind,"gravity":200}

static func ricochet_projectile(start: Vector2, direction: Vector2) -> Dictionary:
	return {"position":start,"velocity":direction.normalized()*450,"bounces_left":3,"bounce_factor":0.8}

static func piercing_projectile(start: Vector2, direction: Vector2) -> Dictionary:
	return {"position":start,"velocity":direction.normalized()*500,"piercing":true,"pierce_count":3}

static func sticky_projectile(start: Vector2, direction: Vector2) -> Dictionary:
	return {"position":start,"velocity":direction.normalized()*380,"sticky":true,"stuck":false}

static func robot_bolt(start: Vector2, direction: Vector2) -> Dictionary:
	return {"position":start,"velocity":direction.normalized()*500,"gravity":0,"color":Color(0.3,0.7,1)}

static func robot_emp_pulse(center: Vector2) -> Dictionary:
	return {"center":center,"radius":10,"max_radius":250,"expand_speed":400,"emp":true}

static func robot_mine(pos: Vector2) -> Dictionary:
	return {"position":pos,"trigger_radius":80,"armed":false,"arm_time":0.5,"damage":50}

static func gas_cloud_launcher(start: Vector2, direction: Vector2) -> Dictionary:
	return {"position":start,"velocity":direction.normalized()*200,"gravity":-30,"expand":true,"expand_rate":40}

static func steam_burst(start: Vector2, direction: Vector2) -> Dictionary:
	return {"position":start,"velocity":direction.normalized()*350,"gravity":-60,"fade":true}

static func pressure_wave(center: Vector2) -> Dictionary:
	return {"center":center,"radius":5,"max_radius":200,"speed":500,"damage_falloff":true}

static func chain_lightning(start: Vector2, direction: Vector2, chains: int = 3) -> Dictionary:
	return {"position":start,"velocity":direction.normalized()*800,"chains_left":chains,"chain_range":120,"hit_targets":[]}

static func tether_projectile(start: Vector2, direction: Vector2) -> Dictionary:
	return {"position":start,"velocity":direction.normalized()*400,"tether":true,"tether_start":start}

static func wave_projectile(start: Vector2, direction: Vector2) -> Dictionary:
	return {"position":start,"velocity":direction.normalized()*280,"amplitude":30,"frequency":8}

static func expanding_ring(center: Vector2) -> Dictionary:
	return {"center":center,"radius":5,"max_radius":300,"speed":350,"damage":25}

static func area_warning_then_impact(center: Vector2, warn_time: float = 1.0) -> Dictionary:
	return {"center":center,"radius":80,"warning_time":warn_time,"phase":"warning","timer":0}

static func projectile_with_trail(start: Vector2, direction: Vector2) -> Dictionary:
	return {"position":start,"velocity":direction.normalized()*400,"trail":true,"trail_interval":0.03}

static func projectile_with_shadow(start: Vector2, direction: Vector2) -> Dictionary:
	return {"position":start,"velocity":direction.normalized()*350,"gravity":400,"shadow":true}

static func projectile_with_impact_particles(start: Vector2, direction: Vector2) -> Dictionary:
	return {"position":start,"velocity":direction.normalized()*380,"impact_particles":"hit_sparks"}

static func projectile_with_camera_shake(start: Vector2, direction: Vector2) -> Dictionary:
	return {"position":start,"velocity":direction.normalized()*400,"camera_shake":true,"shake_strength":8}

static func projectile_with_shader_flash(start: Vector2, direction: Vector2) -> Dictionary:
	return {"position":start,"velocity":direction.normalized()*380,"shader_flash":true,"flash_param":"flash_amount"}

static func slow_straight_shot(start: Vector2, direction: Vector2) -> Dictionary:
	return {"position":start,"velocity":direction.normalized()*150,"gravity":0}

static func fast_straight_shot(start: Vector2, direction: Vector2) -> Dictionary:
	return {"position":start,"velocity":direction.normalized()*900,"gravity":0}

static func aimed_shot(start: Vector2, target: Vector2, speed: float = 500.0) -> Dictionary:
	return {"position":start,"velocity":(target-start).normalized()*speed,"gravity":0}

static func spread_shot_5(start: Vector2, direction: Vector2, angle: float = 0.25) -> Array:
	var base := direction.normalized(); var r: Array = []
	for i in range(-2,3): r.append({"position":start,"velocity":base.rotated(i*angle)*380})
	return r

static func radial_burst_16(center: Vector2) -> Array:
	var r: Array = []
	for i in range(16): r.append({"position":center,"velocity":Vector2.RIGHT.rotated(TAU*i/16.0)*320})
	return r

static func returning_projectile(start: Vector2, direction: Vector2, max_dist: float = 300.0) -> Dictionary:
	return {"position":start,"velocity":direction.normalized()*400,"origin":start,"max_distance":max_dist,"outbound":true}

static func low_arc(start: Vector2, end: Vector2) -> PackedVector2Array:
	return ProjectileMath.sample_arc_points(start,end,40,16)

static func catapult_arc(start: Vector2, target: Vector2) -> PackedVector2Array:
	return ProjectileMath.sample_arc_points(start,target,150,22)

presets.description: Low arc that rolls at end.

presets.code:
static func drop_from_above(target: Vector2, height: float = 300.0) -> Dictionary:
	return {"position":target+Vector2(0,-height),"velocity":Vector2(0,100),"gravity":400}

static func draw_line_preview(line: Line2D, start: Vector2, direction: Vector2, length: float = 300.0) -> void:
	if not line: return
	line.points = PackedVector2Array([start,start+direction.normalized()*length])

static func draw_bounce_preview(line: Line2D, start: Vector2, direction: Vector2, bounces: int = 2) -> void:
	if not line: return
	var pts:=PackedVector2Array([start]); var pos:=start; var vel:=direction.normalized()*300; var g:=500
	for _i in range(bounces*20): vel.y+=g*0.03; pos+=vel*0.03; pts.append(pos); if pos.y>500: vel.y*=-0.6; pos.y=500.0
	line.points=pts

static func moving_target_prediction(shooter: Vector2, target: Vector2, target_vel: Vector2, proj_speed: float = 400.0) -> Vector2:
	var d:=(target-shooter).length()/proj_speed
	return target+target_vel*d

static func impact_time_estimate(start: Vector2, target: Vector2, speed: float = 400.0) -> float:
	return start.distance_to(target)/max(speed,0.01)

presets.description: Check if arc to target is valid.
presets.code:
static func valid_target_arc(start: Vector2, end: Vector2, height: float = 100.0) -> bool:
	for p in ProjectileMath.sample_arc_points(start,end,height,10):
		if p.y<-500: return false
	return true

static func drag_projectile(start: Vector2, direction: Vector2, drag: float = 0.98) -> Dictionary:
	return {"position":start,"velocity":direction.normalized()*500,"drag":drag,"gravity":0}

static func orbit_projectile(center: Vector2, radius: float = 80.0) -> Dictionary:
	return {"center":center,"radius":radius,"angle":0,"angular_speed":3,"velocity":Vector2(0,400)}

static func spiral_projectile(center: Vector2, start_r: float = 10.0, end_r: float = 200.0) -> Dictionary:
	return {"center":center,"radius":start_r,"target_radius":end_r,"angle":0,"expand_rate":80,"spin_rate":4}

static func robot_scanner_ping(center: Vector2) -> Dictionary:
	return {"center":center,"radius":5,"max_radius":400,"speed":600,"scan":true,"detected":[]}

static func robot_drone_shot(start: Vector2, target: Vector2) -> Dictionary:
	return {"position":start,"velocity":(target-start).normalized()*300,"homing":true,"turn_rate":3}

static func robot_turret_shell(start: Vector2, direction: Vector2) -> Dictionary:
	return {"position":start,"velocity":direction.normalized()*700,"gravity":150,"size":8}

static func robot_energy_disc(start: Vector2, direction: Vector2) -> Dictionary:
	return {"position":start,"velocity":direction.normalized()*350,"spin":12,"boomerang":true}

static func coolant_spray_arc(start: Vector2, target: Vector2) -> PackedVector2Array:
	return ProjectileMath.sample_arc_points(start,target,60,18)

static func magnetic_pulse(center: Vector2) -> Dictionary:
	return {"center":center,"radius":10,"max_radius":180,"speed":400,"pull_strength":200}

static func drill_debris(point: Vector2) -> Array:
	var r: Array = []
	for i in range(8): r.append({"position":point,"velocity":Vector2.RIGHT.rotated(TAU*i/8.0)*randf_range(150,300),"gravity":400})
	return r

static func pipe_leak_spray(pos: Vector2, dir: Vector2) -> Dictionary:
	return {"position":pos,"velocity":dir.normalized()*220,"gravity":-40,"continuous":true}

static func delayed_explosion(start: Vector2, direction: Vector2, delay: float = 1.5) -> Dictionary:
	return {"position":start,"velocity":direction.normalized()*300,"fuse":delay,"armed":true}

static func proximity_projectile(start: Vector2, direction: Vector2) -> Dictionary:
	return {"position":start,"velocity":direction.normalized()*350,"proximity_radius":60,"triggered":false}

static func falling_marker(target: Vector2) -> Dictionary:
	return {"position":target+Vector2(0,-400),"velocity":Vector2(0,600),"gravity":0,"marker":true}
